title: The Woman at Platform Seven
content: Commuters often noticed a woman waiting patiently at Platform Seven every Friday afternoon, even though no train ever arrived there at that time. Rumors spread quickly, and many people wondered why she returned week after week. One station employee eventually asked her. She explained that the platform overlooked the tracks where her husband had worked as a railway engineer for many years. After his retirement, she continued visiting simply because the place reminded her of happy memories. The mystery was quietly replaced by understanding.
